_comment: Drum step-grid for grid_to_midi.py. CRITICAL: total bars across all sections MUST equal the ABC's total bars, section for section, or drums drift out of sync. Rows are drums; 'x' = hit, 'X' = accent, 'g' = ghost, '.' = rest; 16 chars = one bar at 16 steps. Let density follow the arc: minimal when quiet, full at the peak, fading at the end. tempo_bpm should ALWAYS be the real musical tempo (matching the ABC's Q: field) -- never fudge it to compensate for beats_per_bar. beats_per_bar is the bar length in quarter-note-equivalents: 4 for 4/4, 3 for 3/4, 3.5 for 7/8 (numerator * 4/denominator) -- set it to match the ABC's M: field. Remove this _comment in the final file.
title: Untitled drums

sections.label: B (peak phase): full, ride opens it up
